cases.passage: The Indian government has been focusing on developing the inland waterways as a mode of transportation to reduce the country's dependence on road and rail networks. The Ganga-Bhagirathi-Hooghly river is being developed as a national waterway. The Inland Waterways Authority of India (IWAI) has been working on the development of the waterway, which will help in reducing the transportation cost and time of goods. The waterway will also help in increasing the economic activities of the people living in the surrounding areas. The IWAI has been working on the development of the waterway for several years and has already seen a significant increase in the number of cargo vessels using the waterway.

questions.q: What is the main focus of the Indian government in developing the inland waterways?
opts: (A) To increase the economic activities of the people living in the surrounding areas
(B) To reduce the country's dependence on road and rail networks
(C) To increase the number of cargo vessels using the waterway
(D) To reduce the transportation cost and time of goods
questions.explanation: The main focus of the Indian government is to reduce the country's dependence on road and rail networks, which will help in reducing the transportation cost and time of goods.

questions.q: What is the name of the river being developed as a national waterway?
questions.explanation: The Ganga-Bhagirathi-Hooghly river is being developed as a national waterway.

questions.q: Who is working on the development of the waterway?
questions.explanation: The Inland Waterways Authority of India (IWAI) is working on the development of the waterway.

questions.q: What is the expected outcome of the development of the waterway?
opts: (A) Increase in the number of cargo vessels using the waterway
(B) Reduction in the transportation cost and time of goods
(C) Increase in the economic activities of the people living in the surrounding areas
questions.explanation: The development of the waterway is expected to reduce the transportation cost and time of goods, increase the economic activities of the people living in the surrounding areas, and increase the number of cargo vessels using the waterway.

questions.q: How many years has the IWAI been working on the development of the waterway?
questions.explanation: The IWAI has been working on the development of the waterway for several years.

cases.passage: The Indian government has been focusing on developing the air transport sector in the country. The government has been investing in the expansion of airports and the introduction of new airlines. The airport in Bengaluru is being upgraded to handle more international flights. The government has also been working on the development of a new airport in the city of Pune. The expansion of the air transport sector is expected to increase the economic activities of the people living in the surrounding areas and create new job opportunities.

questions.q: What is the main focus of the Indian government in developing the air transport sector?
opts: (A) To increase the economic activities of the people living in the surrounding areas
(B) To expand the airports and introduce new airlines
(D) To reduce the transportation cost and time of goods
questions.explanation: The main focus of the Indian government is to expand the airports and introduce new airlines, which will help in increasing the economic activities of the people living in the surrounding areas and create new job opportunities.

questions.explanation: The airport in Bengaluru is being upgraded to handle more international flights.

opts: (A) Increase in the economic activities of the people living in the surrounding areas
(C) Reduction in the transportation cost and time of goods
